data.title: Circle Pharma to present potential of CID-078 at AACR conference on pediatric cancer, a first-in-class oral cyclin A/B RxL inhibitor.
data.description: Circle Pharma, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company based in San Francisco, revealed today that they will present a poster at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Special Conference on Pediatric Cancer in Boston, MA. The poster will discuss the potential of CID-078, their novel therapeutic option for pediatric cancers. The conference, scheduled from September 25-28, serves as a platform to showcase the benefits of CID-078 as a first-in-class, orally bioavailable macrocycle therapy.

data.title: Goldman Sachs warns of upcoming market volatility despite best performing September in 15 years. S&P 500 up 3.6%, Nasdaq up 5.5%, Tech stocks unusually strong.
data.description: US stock indexes had the best September in 15 years, with the S&P 500 up 3.6%, tracking the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF. Tech stocks performed even better, with the Nasdaq 100 up 5.5% and the Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund up 7.5%, its second-strongest September since 1999. This performance is unusual as tech stocks have historically averaged a 2.2% loss in September over the last 25 years. Names like Oracle Corp., Tesla Inc., Micron Technology Inc., and Apple Inc. led the momentum surge. Goldman Sachs anticipates increased market volatility in October due to earnings and macro risks. Full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Polyethylene Furanoate (PEF) market projected to reach $406.6 million by 2030 as per MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on September 27, 2025, a new report was released on the Polyethylene Furanoate (PEF) Market. This report covers various aspects such as sources (plant-based, bio-based), grades, applications (bottles, films, fibers), end-use industries (packaging, fiber & textiles, electronics & electrical, pharmaceuticals), and regions. This market analysis provides insights into the growing usage of PEF in different sectors. Key factors including market trends, statistics, and future projections play a crucial role in understanding the global PEF market landscape.

data.title: Mitch Fadel, former CEO of Upbound and Rent-A-Center, joins DriveItAway Holdings Board of Advisors.
data.description: In Philadelphia, PA on September 25, 2025, DriveItAway Holdings, Inc. (OTC Marketplace: DWAY) revealed that Mitch Fadel, previously CEO of Upbound Group (NASDAQ: UPBD) and Rent-A-Center, is now part of its Board of Advisors. DriveItAway is renowned for its digital mobility services and adaptable vehicle lease-to-own solutions. This strategic addition of Fadel, a seasoned executive in the industry, is expected to bolster DriveItAway's expertise in the field.

data.title: Silexion Therapeutics meets Nasdaq listing criteria, ensuring continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market.
data.description: A company has successfully met the minimum bid price and shareholders' equity requirements for continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. This ensures the company's position on the market with a satisfactory bid price and shareholders' equity. By meeting these requirements, the company has secured its listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market, meeting the necessary standards set by the market. This accomplishment demonstrates the company's financial stability and compliance with market regulations. The successful meeting of these requirements is essential for the company's continued presence on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

data.title: Oroco Resource Corp. holds Live Shareholder Town Hall with Executive Chairman & President Craig Dalziel  Ian Graham.
data.description: The news highlights the presence of Executive Chairman Craig Dalziel and President Ian Graham.

data.title: Avenue Living plans $350M Senior Unsecured Debenture Offering due on Sep 25, 2028 in Calgary.
data.description: Today, Avenue Living (2014) LP revealed the pricing details of its latest financial move in Calgary, AB. The company has set the offering (the “Offering”) at $350 million for Series B senior unsecured debentures (the “Debentures”). These Debentures will amount to $350 million in aggregate principal and are set to be issued at par, with a maturity date of September 25, 2028.

data.title: Accenture's fiscal 2026 revenue outlook falls short of expectations due to lower U.S. spending, stock dip post fiscal Q4 earnings.
data.description: Accenture's stock decreased following their fiscal Q4 earnings report, which slightly surpassed analysts' expectations. However, the company's projected sales for fiscal 2026 fell below anticipated figures, particularly due to lower U.S. spending. This news was reported on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: HII Successfully Completes Builder’s Sea Trials for Destroyer Ted Stevens (DDG 128)
data.description: In Pascagoula, Mississippi, on September 27, 2025, HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding division, a part of NYSE-listed HII, accomplished builder’s sea trials for guided missile destroyer Ted Stevens (DDG 128). This signifies a significant advancement in the manufacturing process of the second Flight III destroyer built at Ingalls. The trials took place over multiple days in the Gulf of America, examining the ship’s engineering, navigation, and combat systems to guarantee its preparedness for upcoming acceptance trials and subsequent handover to the U.S. Navy.

data.title: Retail investors and quants boost DEX usage, with CEXs dominating institutionally. Hyperliquid gains traction amidst Aster's emergence in the onchain competition.
data.description: The growing popularity of decentralized exchanges (DEXs) such as Hyperliquid is being driven by retail traders and quantitative analysts, while centralized exchanges (CEXs) continue to dominate the institutional market. The increasing value of Aster is intensifying competition in the decentralized trading arena. This trend highlights the ongoing rivalry between on-chain and centralized exchanges, with significant numbers of users and investors participating in both options.

data.title: Earn $28K for setting a Guinness record by doing kickflips for crypto thanks to The Haberdashery and POIDH users.
data.description: A decentralized autonomous organization known as The Haberdashery, along with numerous users from POIDH, is funding a meme coin bounty.

data.title: NYT Bestselling Author numeroff publishes corgi pic book, "Max and Mama", illustrating mother-son bond. Sudovykh's corgi illustrations.
data.description: In Dallas, a new picture book titled "Max and Mama" by Laura Numeroff and illustrator Masha Sudovykh celebrates the unique relationship between a mother and her son. Released by Michael Sampson Books, this book, now available, showcases Numeroff's whimsical writing style alongside Sudovykh's charming corgi illustrations. Through a series of daily activities depicted in the book, aimed at early childhood literacy, the story emphasizes perseverance and the value of determination to young readers. The book aims to inspire children not to abandon their efforts, echoing a message of resilience.

data.title: Nvidia and other AI stocks like chip company are leading 5 stocks near buy points, as per Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Three out of the five stocks worth monitoring are related to the artificial intelligence sector, with one being chip manufacturer Nvidia. These AI-focused stocks are showing promising signs and may be near buy points, as per the report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: University of Phoenix alumna named 2025 Outstanding Early Career Educator in Illinois. Kleindl teaches at Freeport High School.
data.description: In Phoenix, the University of Phoenix commends Jena Kleindl, a College of Education graduate, for receiving the 2025 Outstanding Early Career Educator award from the Illinois State Board of Education. Kleindl, an alumna, excels as an English and Journalism teacher at Freeport High School in Freeport School District 145. Additionally, she serves as the advisor for the National Honor Society and leads the school’s speech team. Kleindl's achievements reflect her dedication to education and mentoring future leaders.

data.title: In 2025, the green bond market encounters obstacles like rate fluctuation and climate issues, as highlighted by VanEck.
data.description: In 2025, the green bond market has shown growth and adaptability despite facing obstacles like fluctuating interest rates and climate-related issues. VanEck reports that they continue to see progress in this market, indicating resilience in the face of challenges.

data.title: NVIDIA introduces 'Mecha BREAK' on GeForce NOW with DLSS 4, boosting gaming with 10 fresh titles.
data.description: NVIDIA has revealed the introduction of 'Mecha BREAK' on GeForce NOW, which showcases DLSS 4 technology to elevate the gaming experience. This launch includes 10 fresh titles aimed at enhancing user engagement and overall enjoyment.

data.title: WLFI, supported by Trump, destroys $1.43M of tokens post $1.06M buyback. $3.06M tokens remain unburned.
data.description: WLFI, which is supported by Trump, has recently disposed of $1.43 million worth of tokens. This move followed a $1.06 million repurchase that was financed through DeFi fees. As of now, there are still 3.06 million tokens from the initial repurchase that have not been burned yet.

data.title: Bioplastics & Biopolymers Market to reach $45.04 billion by 2030, detailed in report by MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on September 27, 2025, a report was released regarding the Bioplastics & Biopolymers Market. The market is categorized by product type into biodegradable and non-biodegradable materials and is segmented by end-use industry, including packaging, automotive, textile, consumer goods, and agriculture. The raw materials used for these products consist of sugarcane, wheat, and corn starch. This report analyzes the market trends and forecasts based on region.

data.title: Tech hub in Guian New Area, China, produces electric trucks in 15 mins, part of national strategy. Rapid transformation underway.
data.description: In the city of Guiyang, China, as of September 27, 2025, significant developments are taking place in the Guian New Area, a key tech center linked to China's national growth goals. This region in central Guizhou is experiencing swift changes, with large-scale data management and advanced technological innovation being key focus areas.
